overview: Concierge internal medicine practice in Woodstock, GA offering extended office visits and personalized care plans. Dr. Skardasis emphasizes a holistic approach addressing nutrition, exercise, sleep, and stress with a goal of creating health rather than managing disease through medications.
highlights: 24/7 direct physician access via text, phone, or email
targetAudience: Patients seeking personalized primary care with direct physician access and focus on prevention and longevity.
